summary: Closed the missing generated-bundle and target mirror evidence for the base memory movement boundary using strided_load_unit_store as the executable fixture. Added base_memory_movement_boundary evidence derived from bundle metadata and expected provider-owned statement plans, explicit/pre-realized dry-run FileCheck assertions, pre-realized target artifact mirror checks, and durable RVV plugin spec requirements. Production C++ family/provider ownership already covered the six route-supported base memory forms; this round did not add new memory semantics or route authority.
